name: Fart RPG
description:
I'M SO SORRY 😭
I forgot to attach the lorebook so the bot wasn't working correctly, it's fixed now.

(I put something in the intro that was meant to be put in the scenario... Maybe i should stop editing this while I'm working on 2 hours of sleep.)

A fart fetish based rpg inspired by a now deleted bot by someone else.
The only thing taken from the other rpg is the intro message.
I may get rid of the intro later to make my own intro and make the bot fully original (But I'm lazy).

If there are any problems with the bot lmk, any whining about it being fart fetish will be ignored.
But if people request a non-fart version of the bot, it will take a bit to do but I will likely make it.

Art by: RepulsiveProto
creator: xerorez
